title: solanum tomatillo
intro: Solanum tomatillo, a species of plant in the nightshade family, is a type of fruit-bearing shrub native to the Americas. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. Tomatillo contains various nutrients, including vitamins A and C, potassium, and fiber, providing several health benefits such as supporting immune function, reducing blood pressure, and promoting digestive health. Tomatillo can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and fruits in water or other solvents.
